user.description:
Please select your NWS lookup method.

GPS Location is recommended for most users as it provides the most accurate alerts for your precise location.

Zone ID covers a broader area and may include alerts that do not affect your exact location.

menu_options.zone: Zone ID (broader area — includes County ID if applicable)

gps_tracker.description: Select the device you'd like to track for alerts.

gps_loc.description: Please enter your latitude and longitude, by default your coordinates from Home Assistant are used.

zone.description:
You can find your Zone or County ID by going to https://alerts.weather.gov/,
scroll down to your state and click on the 'zone list' and/or 'county list' then look for the entry for your county.
Separate multiple zones with commas ie: PAC049,WVC031

Zones closest to you will be populated automatically.
